description_long: This is a compact, modern wooden cabinet with a rectangular body and four cylindrical legs. The cabinet features a light natural wood finish, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance suitable for urban environments. The front face has a single, flush drawer panel with no visible handle, contributing to its minimalist design. The legs are slightly tapered and positioned at the corners, providing stability and a touch of elegance. The sides and top are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the simplicity of the form. This piece would function well as a nightstand, side table, or small storage unit in public or semi-public urban spaces.
description: A small, modern wooden cabinet with a single flush drawer and four cylindrical legs, finished in light natural wood.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flush drawer panel and two front legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cabinet's depth and the smooth, unadorned side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back and the alignment of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other side panel and leg arrangement.
